## Dialectic Ballot

### DECISION_1: Two-voter unanimous case

Defense A (defends CHOSEN=option-a):
<defense_content>
Chosen arguments.
</defense_content>

Defense B (defends ALTERNATIVE=option-b):
<defense_content>
Alternative arguments.
</defense_content>

### DECISION_2: Two-voter 1-1 tie case

Defense A (defends ALTERNATIVE=option-y):
<defense_content>
Alternative arguments.
</defense_content>

Defense B (defends CHOSEN=option-x):
<defense_content>
Chosen arguments.
</defense_content>
